case_title: WARD, J. vs. ROB - M.M.S. DBA ENVIRONMENTAL GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AND AS TO WHY THERE IS NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT OR DISMISSAL OF ACTION. AFFIDAVIT CLOSE CASE AND RETURN FILIG FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, J.
